About.title: We are a <highlight>family law</highlight> firm in {city}, {country}.
About.founderBio: With over 9 years of experience resolving family conflicts, Silvia González specializes in complex divorces, child custody agreements, and alimony litigation. Her practical and compassionate approach ensures clients feel they have an ally by their side during what is often the most difficult time of their lives.
About.firmDescription: We understand the stress and emotional toll of family law in Managua, Nicaragua. We protect what matters most to you and yours.

Services.label: You don't have to do it alone
Services.title: We can help you with your divorce and family law matters.

separacion.title: Legal Separation
separacion.shortDescription: Separation agreements are a mutually acceptable and lasting alternative for resolving couple conflicts.

divorcio.title: Divorce
divorcio.shortDescription: A divorce is one of the most practical aspects of the process. We can help you navigate each stage.

custodia.title: Child Custody and Support
custodia.shortDescription: The interests of the children are always the top priority. We can help you protect your role in their lives.

pension.title: Alimony
pension.shortDescription: Achieve financial independence after a legal process. We determine the fair amount of alimony.

mediacion.title: Family Mediation
mediacion.shortDescription: A personal approach to resolving conflicts. Mediation helps find solutions without going to trial.

violencia.title: Domestic Violence

Tabs.label: Basic family law services
Tabs.title: A holistic approach to providing family law services

0.title: Collaborative Law
0.content: Can you and your spouse consider your family law issue as a "problem to solve" and not as a "competition to win"? Collaborative law is a legal process that allows couples who have decided to separate to resolve their differences outside of court. Our team facilitates respectful negotiations to reach agreements that satisfy the needs of both parties and their children.

1.title: Absolute Divorce
1.content: When definitive separation is the best option, our team guides you through each stage of the divorce process in Nicaragua. We handle legal documentation, equitable distribution of assets, custody and support agreements, ensuring that your rights are protected at all times. Our approach is to make this process as efficient and painless as possible.

2.title: Litigation
2.content: For cases that require judicial intervention, we have extensive experience in family law litigation before the courts of Managua and throughout Nicaragua. Our lawyers present solid and well-founded cases, fighting firmly for the rights of our clients. When negotiation is not possible, preparation and experience in court make the difference.

CTA.title: Call today to discuss your family law case
CTA.subtitle: Free initial consultation. We are ready to help you.

Testimonials.label: Testimonials
Testimonials.title: What our clients say!
Testimonials.subtitle: The satisfaction of our clients is our greatest reward.

0.quote: The team was incredibly professional and compassionate during my divorce. They explained every step of the process and fought for my rights and those of my children. I couldn't be more grateful.

1.quote: We reached agreements peacefully and without going to trial, thanks to their collaborative law approach. This greatly reduced the stress on our family and allowed us to move forward faster.

2.quote: From the first consultation, I felt heard and understood. They are family law experts and managed to get the fair alimony my children deserved. Highly recommended.

3.quote: In a moment of great vulnerability, I found the legal and human support I needed. They helped me obtain protective measures and ensure my family's long-term well-being.

Contact.title: Our team is here to help.
Contact.subtitle: Do you have any questions or want to schedule an appointment? Contact us.
